summary: Combines zero or more path segments into a normalized POSIX-style path string.
signature_intent: Accepts any number of path segment inputs and returns a string path.
behavior: Validates each provided segment before combining.
Ignores empty segments when building the result.
Separates retained segments with forward slashes.
Normalizes the combined path before returning it.
edge_cases: Returns "." when no segments are provided.
Returns "." when all provided segments are empty.
Throws if any provided segment fails path validation.
forbidden_details: Does not expose implementation variable names.
Does not reference repository names or source locations.
Does not describe internal control-flow details.
